analysis: The project is a test website with a focus on black holes. The current theme needs to be enhanced to include a dark, cosmic theme with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML structure is incomplete, and the CSS file needs to be updated with Egyptian-themed color palette and UI elements. The JavaScript file needs to be updated with improved mobile menu toggle functionality and proper event handling.

improvements.description: Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Update the CSS file with Egyptian-themed color palette and UI elements. Fix the SVG data URL in --black-hole-pattern-5 to include proper SVG content and ensure it is correctly formatted.

Update the JavaScript file with improved mobile menu toggle functionality, proper event handling, smooth transitions, and user-friendly interactions. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html. Ensure all functions are properly implemented and fix any syntax errors.
